mapper.sql: A.ARTWORK_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.TITLE, A.CONTENT, A.CATEGORY_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME, A.IS_STATUS, A.VIEW_COUNT, NVL(LK.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, M.NICKNAME, AF.FILE_PATH AS THUMB_URL, A.REG_DT, A.COMP_DT, A.IS_HIDDEN

FROM CRAFT_PROJECT A INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON A.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN CATEGORY C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_CNT FROM LIKE_TBL WHERE TARGET_TYPE = 'ARTWORK' GROUP BY TARGET_ID ) LK ON A.ARTWORK_ID = LK.TARGET_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, FILE_PATH FROM ( SELECT TARGET_ID, FILE_PATH, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TARGET_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM ATTACH_FILE WHERE TARGET_TYPE = 'ARTWORK' AND IS_REP = 'Y' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) AF ON A.ARTWORK_ID = AF.TARGET_ID

choose.otherwise: AND ( A.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR A.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR M.NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR C.CATEGORY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.REG_DT DESC) AS RN
) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT , (NVL(LK.LIKE_CNT, 0) * 3 + A.VIEW_COUNT) AS RECOMMEND_SCORE
ORDER BY RECOMMEND_SCORE DESC, A.REG_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ARTWORK_ID, A.MEMBER_ID, A.TITLE, A.CONTENT, A.CATEGORY_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME, A.IS_STATUS, A.VIEW_COUNT, NVL(LK.LIKE_CNT, 0) AS LIKE_COUNT, M.NICKNAME, AF.FILE_PATH AS THUMB_URL, A.REG_DT, A.COMP_DT, A.IS_HIDDEN, NVL(RL.RECENT_CNT, 0) AS RECENT_LIKE_COUNT FROM CRAFT_PROJECT A INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON A.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN CATEGORY C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, COUNT(*) AS LIKE_CNT FROM LIKE_TBL WHERE TARGET_TYPE = 'ARTWORK' GROUP BY TARGET_ID ) LK ON A.ARTWORK_ID = LK.TARGET_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, COUNT(*) AS RECENT_CNT FROM LIKE_TBL WHERE TARGET_TYPE = 'ARTWORK' AND REG_DT >= SYSDATE - #{days} GROUP BY TARGET_ID ) RL ON A.ARTWORK_ID = RL.TARGET_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_ID, FILE_PATH FROM ( SELECT TARGET_ID, FILE_PATH, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TARGET_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID) AS RN FROM ATTACH_FILE WHERE TARGET_TYPE = 'ARTWORK' AND IS_REP = 'Y' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) AF ON A.ARTWORK_ID = AF.TARGET_ID WHERE A.IS_STATUS = 'Y' AND NVL(A.IS_HIDDEN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY RECENT_LIKE_COUNT DESC, LIKE_COUNT DESC, A.VIEW_COUNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.REG_DT DESC) AS RN
) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
